_meta.note: First real regression pins for the deterministic bounded-ML AutoResearch claims in manuscript/03_results.md 'Candidate Outcome'. Every value is re-derived by calling src.ml.task.run_bounded_ml_task with the configured budget policy (no mocks, no hand-copy). Percent-rendered tokens (BASELINE_ACCURACY, BEST_ACCURACY, ACCURACY_DELTA) pin the underlying raw fraction the token formats.

candidate_outcome_candidate_count.reason: Total proposed candidate set size for the bounded loop (len(config.candidates)); manuscript token {{CANDIDATE_COUNT}}.
candidate_outcome_candidate_count.script: cd projects/templates/template_autoresearch_project; PYTHONPATH=$(pwd):$(pwd)/src:<repo_root> python -c 'from src.config import load_loop_config; from src.ml.task import run_bounded_ml_task; from pathlib import Path; c=load_loop_config(Path.cwd()); r=run_bounded_ml_task(Path.cwd(), c.budget_policy); print(r.candidate_count)'

candidate_outcome_evaluated_candidate_co.reason: Number of candidates actually evaluated under the budget cap (min(max_candidates, max_iterations)); manuscript token {{EVALUATED_CANDIDATE_COUNT}}.
candidate_outcome_evaluated_candidate_co.script: same probe as above; printed r.evaluated_candidate_count

candidate_outcome_baseline_accuracy.reason: Nearest-centroid baseline test accuracy on the fixed local MNIST fixture; manuscript token {{BASELINE_ACCURACY}} renders 0.826 as 82.6%.
candidate_outcome_baseline_accuracy.script: same probe as above; printed r.baseline.test_accuracy

candidate_outcome_best_accuracy.reason: Accepted-candidate (exp-mlp-tanh-64) test accuracy; manuscript token {{BEST_ACCURACY}} renders 0.894 as 89.4%.
candidate_outcome_best_accuracy.script: same probe as above; printed r.best_accuracy

candidate_outcome_accuracy_delta.reason: Absolute accuracy improvement of the accepted candidate over the baseline (best_accuracy - baseline_accuracy); manuscript token {{ACCURACY_DELTA}} renders 0.068 as 6.8%.
candidate_outcome_accuracy_delta.script: same probe as above; printed round(r.accuracy_delta, 6)

candidate_outcome_accepted_parameter_cou.reason: Trained parameter count of the accepted MLP candidate; manuscript token {{ACCEPTED_PARAMETER_COUNT}}.
candidate_outcome_accepted_parameter_cou.script: same probe as above; printed r.accepted_candidate.parameter_count

candidate_outcome_benchmark_score.reason: Compact methods-contract benchmark score (mean of metric/budget/offline/neural/selection component scores, rounded to 3dp); manuscript token {{BENCHMARK_SCORE}} renders 1.0 as 1.
candidate_outcome_benchmark_score.script: same probe as above; printed r.benchmark_score

candidate_outcome_candidate_count.claim_text: ... after evaluating {{EVALUATED_CANDIDATE_COUNT}} candidate(s) from a proposed set of {{CANDIDATE_COUNT}}.

candidate_outcome_evaluated_candidate_co.claim_text: ... after evaluating {{EVALUATED_CANDIDATE_COUNT}} candidate(s) from a proposed set of {{CANDIDATE_COUNT}}.
